First we need to know some of the key contacts...

Someone we can share device details with. They are responsible for receiving the shipment.

Request Submitted!

Your VMS device request has been received and is being processed.

Confirmation Number

What Happens Next?

1

Verify Your Email Address

Check for a verification link. You must verify your email before we can process your order.

2

Order Confirmation

After email verification, you'll receive a full order confirmation with device specifications and expected timeline.

3

Device Preparation

Our team will configure your VMS device for your specific site and camera setup. This typically takes 1-2 business days.

4

Shipping & Tracking

Your device will be shipped to . You'll receive tracking information via email. Estimated delivery: 3-5 business days.

5

Installation Support

Once you receive the device, our technical team will guide you through the installation and camera connection setup.
